executives.name: Micael Johansson
executives.background: President and CEO since 2019. Joined Saab in 1985. Previously Senior Vice President and Deputy CEO. Holds a B.Sc. in Mathematics and Computer Science from Uppsala University.

executives.name: Christian Luiga
executives.background: CFO and Deputy CEO. Joined Saab in 2020. Previously acting CEO and CFO at Telia Company. Holds a B.Sc. in Business Administration and Economics.

executives.name: Lars Tossman
executives.background: Head of Business Area Aeronautics. Joined Saab in 1986. Previously Head of Business Area Kockums and Head of Business Unit Radar Solutions.

executives.name: Gunnar Wieslander
executives.background: Head of Business Area Kockums. Joined Saab in 2015. Former Rear Admiral in the Swedish Navy and State Secretary.

board_of_directors.name: Marcus Wallenberg
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of the Board. Member of the Board since 1992. Chairman of SEB and FAM AB. Board member of AstraZeneca and Investor AB.

board_of_directors.name: Bert Nordberg
board_of_directors.background: Deputy Chairman. Member of the Board since 2016. Former Chairman of Vestas Wind Systems and CEO of Sony Mobile Communications.

board_of_directors.name: Lena Erixon
board_of_directors.background: Member of the Board since 2022. Former Director General of the Swedish Transport Administration.

board_of_directors.name: Henrik Henriksson
board_of_directors.background: Member of the Board since 2021. CEO of H2 Green Steel. Former CEO of Scania.

board_of_directors.name: Micael Johansson
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Saab AB. Member of the Board since 2020.
